item_specifications.special_feature: Durable, Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Removable and Washable, Waterproof

about_item: Removable and Washable Cover: The waterproof dog bed sofa has two layers of covers with high-quality U-shaped zippers, removable and machine-washable. Large dog bed covers are made of soft microsuede material. The fabric is designed to withstand rubbing, digging & nesting. The TPU 100% waterproof lining in the middle easily copes with accidents. This washable dog bed provides a cleaner environment for pets and protects the dog's health.

7 Inch Thick Three Layer Memory Foam Orthopedic Dog Bed: This Orthopedic dog beds are made of 3 layers of high-density sponge and memory foam, effectively and comfortably providing dogs with strong support. A large dog bed helps to relieve body pain and joint pain, promoting a deep sleep. This makes it suitable as a dog cot, or dog beds large sized dog option.

Just-Right Size for Medium to Large Dogs: This large dog bed measures 48" x 30" x 7". It is suitable for Labrador, Boxer, Golden Retriever, Pit Bull, Husky, and other large dogs. The large dog bed provides ample space for dogs to stretch out and sleep comfortably in any occasion. The jumbo dog bed can be used in various environments, including dog cages, cars, backyards, indoors and outdoors, offering your dog a comfortable and warm bed at all times. It also fits well as a dog couch, kennel pet bed, or dog beds medium sized dog.

Upgraded Non-slip Design: Our dog bed is equipped with an upgraded non-slip bottom that holds the dog bed in place, ensuring your dog feels safe and happy while playing. The 4" headrest pillow is designed to help distribute the body’s pressure on the bed, which is important to maintain your pet’s sleeping position during long sleep periods.

Helpful Tip for a Smoother Transition: When you receive your dog bed for large dogs, please allow 24–48 hours for the Rainmr bed to fully expand to its standard height and shape. To help your dog quickly get used to the new bed, place a blanket, toy, or cushion from their previous bed on top. Familiar scents from their old items can make the transition smoother and more comforting.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be well-made and spacious enough for large breeds like mastiffs, with a thick, sturdy foam construction that provides excellent comfort and support, particularly for larger dogs like pitbulls. They appreciate its durability, with one customer noting it comfortably held up 350 lbs, and consider it worth the price. The bed receives positive feedback for its firmness, with one customer describing it as feeling like a real mattress.

authors_reviews.title: Awesome Bed for an Awesome Price!
authors_reviews.text: I purchased 1 Large and 1 XL mattress and I am so impressed by the quality that I just had to submit a review to let any potential buyers know how perfect this bed really is. It took me a few months to decide, as there are so many options to choose from, which made it difficult for me to choose just 1. In the end, it was between Rainmr, Laifug, Kopeks and Sytopia (all on Amazon) because they all had great reviews, affordable prices, neither of them had egg crate foam, they all had the waterproof liner, the non-slip bottoms, intended for large breeds, they all have the neck gap, are all orthopedic and consist of high density and memory foam. I really liked Laifug but I believe my big dogs need more than 4 inches of cushion. I wanted to make sure they didn't have to sink to the ground when sitting/laying down on their bed. Kopeks only had 1 size that I was able to find and I didn't want the plush cover, as my dogs' fur can get really staticky and I've noticed that plush material seems to only make it worse. After browsing through so many reviews, videos and photos, with my calculator in hand, I came to find that (in my opinion) Sytopia was the closest contender, as they appear to be very similar to the Rainmr but again, I only found them in 1 size and 1 of my dogs is bigger than the other. Also, I live in a tiny apartment home and probably couldnt fit 2 XL dog beds in here. Rianmr actually is more expensive than Sytopia but I was lucky to unlock a 50% Off discount on the Large size. Since the beds are compressed and shipped in a box, I was nervous that they would not plump up but thank goodness, as soon as we took them out of their boxes, they plumped right up. I'm sure we didn't need to let them air out for the 24-48 hours that is recommended on the instructions but we did anyway. So far, my dogs seem to love their new beds. They are actually really soft and squishy but firm enough where my boys are not touching the ground when using them and it's not too soft where its difficult for them to get out of bed. They are able to spread out as much as they want, toss, turn, flip and roll as they choose. My bullies have rough paws and huge nails that seem to rip through alot and my dogs are gentle with nothing and still they haven't ripped any holes or damaged their new mattresses in any way. my older dog seems to understand the purpose of the neck gap but my puppy, not so much. It can get cold in my apartment with the air conditioner always on so I laid some blankets on top of their beds for them to snuggle with and that sealed the deal. We are very satisfied with their new beds! If you're looking for a good quality bed for your big dog but don't want to pay the price of a Barker.. this is it right here.
authors_reviews.author: Mercedes Altamirano

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy & Well Loved
authors_reviews.text: Great buy! I bought this a couple years ago for my 120lb dog, and it has held up amazingly. It has a very thick sturdy foam that truly keeps its shape. We got a very large size to accommodate her, and she is able to stretch out with no problem. She loves the large groove, as she uses it like a pillow. The cover is soft and feels like a suede. I love that the cover is also machine washable, keeping her bed fresh. It looks very modern and fits perfect in our room. I’m sure our dog will use this for many years to come!
authors_reviews.author: Saraya

authors_reviews.title: EXCELLENT thus far -Hope this helps!
authors_reviews.text: Just received this product 1 day ago. After unpackaging, it expanded right away, but NOT YET to it's fullly intended 7" height. For us, full expansion happened after leaving it lying flat for just about 22 1/2 hours... BEST TIP (from Ole "Rufus"): measure the height at different places all around the bed and when you've hit 7" all around -it's expanded fully and ready for use. I can confirm that this expansion recommendation is accurate as 6 or so hours after unpackaging product, height measured between 6" to 6.5" in different spaces around, and after letting it sit another16 hours overnight, it expanded fully and was ready for use. THE BED & MY DOG: The bed is of nice quality and looks GREAT! My 94lb Black Lab highly approves and he's going in for TPLO surgery, so I upgraded his bedding from his old 4" high egg crate foam bed to help keep him comfortable with this far superior memory foam bed -it's worth every dime -buy with confidence. THE COVER: I washed the cover in cold and dried it on medium heat setting while waiting for the expansion to happen. It did not shrink at all and the microsuede, thus far, feels sturdy and looks great. Hope this helps. I compared MANY and read MANY reviews, but the proof is in the pudding. Don't anticipate any problems and if so, I'll report back.
authors_reviews.author: MGG

authors_reviews.title: Amazing quality, dogs new favorite spot!
authors_reviews.text: This bed surpassed my expectations! I have two dogs, one is a pit boxer mix the other is a pit Blue heeler mix. The heeler ruptured her ccl and has been limping off and on for months! The moment I think she's doing better she'd jump off the couch (both their favorite spots) and boom, back to limping. She started limping recently on her front leg now as well so I decided to give this a try. These two that LOVE the couch now prefer these beds over the couch! Best part is that hey are both limping far less now in just a matter or days of using this. The one we got, the cover almost feels like suede type fabric. It is thick and well made. That was my biggest concern was that they would chew these up. There is really a slim chance that will happen.
authors_reviews.author: Tanya Parshall

authors_reviews.title: Terrific bed, especially for special senior pups
authors_reviews.text: My 11 year-old shepherd mix seems to really love this, especially the headrest. He's about 75 pounds, is built like a tank and comfortably fits (with room to spare) on the 48"x30" size. It's easy to open and set up. The only fault was that the lightweight cotton inner lining/cover had a really cheap zipper and the pull broke off on the first use. That's not really a problem for me because I put a throw, then a twin sheet over the bed so that I can easily remove and clean the dog's bedding weekly. I rarely wash the outer or inner covers of the bed itself. This is the nicest dog bed I've ever seen. It's really comfortable because I napped on it and it's nicer than my mattress.
authors_reviews.author: rebecca l.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for my fur baby
authors_reviews.text: Prefect fit for my cane corso. I will be buying again if needed. My fur baby loves it. It’s soft and comfortable for him. Easy to take cover in and off for washing!! That’s another huge plus able to wash the cover. The zipper goes all the way around .
authors_reviews.author: Ashley Phillips

authors_reviews.title: Best Dog bed
authors_reviews.text: It shipped so fast! It’s super comfortable, great thickness, and feels of great quality! I got the Large camel color for my German Shepherd. I honestly should have gotten the XL but I was trying to save a little money. Besides that he does fit perfectly on it! It fluffed up within seconds! Was very easy to assemble and apply the cover on it. Next year im going to get him the XL! :)
authors_reviews.author: Gabbie
